enriched_points.expanded_content: TMOs exhibit remarkable electrochemical and optical characteristics, enabling applications in energy conversion, storage, and advanced electronic devices, as noted in various studies.
Transition metal oxides are being explored for drug delivery systems, leveraging their biocompatibility and ability to modify drug release profiles for targeted therapies.
TMOs demonstrate potential in biosensing through their unique surface properties, allowing for sensitive detection of biomolecules, enhancing diagnostic accuracy.
The unique structure of TMOs promotes efficient electron transfer, crucial for catalysis and energy applications, as evidenced by their use in fuel cells.
With their biocompatibility and versatility, TMOs hold promise in personalized medicine, potentially tailoring treatments based on individual patient needs and responses.
